nasb.text: At this remark, Moses fled and became an alien in the land of Midian, where he became the father of two sons.

esv.text: At this retort Moses fled and became an exile in the land of Midian, where he became the father of two sons.

cnv.text: 摩西因為這句話，就逃到米甸地寄居，在那裡生了兩個兒子。

ccb.text: 摩西听了这话，就逃到米甸寄居，在那里成家，生了两个儿子。

csbs.text: “摩西听了这话就逃跑了，并寄居在米甸地，在那里生了两个儿子。
